text: I sense a blend of curiosity and contemplation in this vibrant, modern space. The warm lighting in the first room creates a welcoming atmosphere, while the exhibit in the second image invites intellectual engagement and wonder about humanity's relationship with technology. Being here, I feel inspired to ponder deeply on progress and the future, yet also anchored by the physical presence of practical objects—fire hydrant, cables, and the everyday structure around me. My mind is lively, alert, and open to the interplay between art, science, and safety.
